projects.title: Custom Industrial CRM
projects.shortDescription: A scalable Customer Relationship Management system designed from scratch following industrial standards and 3NF database principles.
projects.longDescription: Designed and implemented a custom CRM system from scratch for Keshav Encon, focusing on 3NF normalization principles to ensure robust data integrity and long-term maintainability. Conducted field analysis across 50+ websites to design an industry-standard schema aligned with real-world CRM workflows and client requirements.

problem.summary: Off-the-shelf CRMs failed to meet specific industrial data relationship requirements and were difficult to scale or maintain long-term.
constraints: Strict adherence to 3NF for data integrity
Schema must align with industrial workflows and client requirements
Maintainability and extensibility for future modules

solution.approach: Built a custom database schema aligned with specific industrial workflows and client requirements after analyzing data fields from 50+ websites.
solution.architecture: Modular backend with JWT-based authentication and a layered service-repository separation.
solution.tradeoffs: Custom development took longer than off-the-shelf configuration but resulted in 100% feature alignment and full data integrity control.

features.title: Industry-Standard Schema Design
features.description: Analyzed data fields from 50+ websites to design a CRM schema aligned with industrial standards.
features.impact: Eliminated data redundancy and ensured strong data integrity

features.title: JWT-Based Authentication
features.description: Implemented JWT-based auth for secure access control across the CRM.
features.impact: Secure and maintainable access management

challenges.challenge: Aligning the technical schema with complex client business logic and industrial workflows.
challenges.solution: Used detailed entity-relationship modeling and analyzed 50+ reference websites before writing any code.
challenges.learning: Architecture and requirement analysis are as important as the code itself.

metrics.performance: Optimized for fast client data retrieval with normalized schema

confidentiality.notes: Core architecture and client data details are proprietary to Keshav Encon Private Limited.

projects.title: TalentPulseAI
projects.shortDescription: An AI-powered online skill assessment platform for recruiters and companies with automated question generation and complex performance tracking.
projects.longDescription: TalentPulseAI is a comprehensive skill assessment ecosystem built for recruiters and companies. It features a scalable relational database with 50+ normalized tables, a Gemini LLM-powered question generation module that automated 80% of manual content creation, custom OAuth 2.0 authentication built from scratch, and a hybrid ORM + raw SQL backend that improved complex query performance by 30%. The platform supports multi-level RBAC, React.js frontend integration, and is deployed on Firebase and AWS.

problem.summary: Manual question creation was slow and error-prone, while complex assessment reporting queries suffered from high latency across large relational datasets.
constraints: Need for high-concurrency handling across 50+ relational tables
Zero third-party dependency for OAuth 2.0 implementation
Complex multi-level access control for recruiters and companies

solution.approach: Built a Node.js and Express.js backend with a hybrid ORM + raw SQL data access layer, custom OAuth 2.0 flows, and Gemini LLM integration for automated question generation.
solution.architecture: Scalable relational backend with 50+ normalized tables, hybrid ORM + raw SQL for performance-critical paths, RBAC, and modular REST API design.
solution.tradeoffs: Used raw SQL for complex reporting queries to gain 30% performance improvement at the cost of some database abstraction.

features.title: AI-Powered Question Generation
features.description: Developed a Gemini LLM-powered question generation module that automated the manual assessment content creation workflow.
features.impact: Automated 80% of manual content creation; reduced question preparation time from hours to minutes

features.title: Custom OAuth 2.0 Authentication
features.description: Engineered Google and LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 authentication flows from scratch without any third-party security libraries, with JWT-based token management.
features.impact: Full control over auth handshake with higher security and zero external dependencies

features.title: Hybrid ORM + Raw SQL Backend
features.description: Designed and developed 100+ RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js with a hybrid Sequelize ORM + raw SQL approach for performance-critical paths.
features.impact: 30% improvement in complex query execution time

features.title: Scalable Relational Database
features.description: Designed a complete relational database schema with 50+ normalized tables, indexed relationships, and optimized constraints.
features.impact: Enterprise-ready architecture with high-performance query execution and long-term scalability

features.title: Multi-Level RBAC
features.description: Implemented Role-Based Access Control across the platform with multi-level permission hierarchies for secure and controlled access.
features.impact: Secure, role-specific access to sensitive company and recruiter data

features.title: Product Research & Feature Scoping
features.description: Conducted in-depth feature research and product benchmarking to define functional scope and roadmap, finalizing 25+ core features.
features.impact: Well-defined roadmap aligned with company objectives and recruiter workflows

challenges.challenge: Optimizing complex queries across 50+ relational tables with high concurrency requirements.
challenges.solution: Implemented a hybrid approach — Sequelize ORM for standard operations and raw SQL for performance-critical assessment reporting paths.
challenges.learning: ORM abstraction has real limits in high-performance data reporting; knowing when to drop to raw SQL is a critical engineering decision.

challenges.challenge: Implementing OAuth 2.0 for Google and LinkedIn without third-party libraries.
challenges.solution: Built the full OAuth 2.0 handshake and JWT token management from scratch using Node.js and Express.js middleware.
challenges.learning: Understanding the OAuth 2.0 spec deeply enables more secure and controllable auth implementations than using black-box libraries.

metrics.performance: 30% improvement in complex query execution time via hybrid ORM + raw SQL approach
metrics.scale: Enterprise-ready architecture with 50+ normalized tables and 100+ REST APIs
metrics.reliability: Full RBAC, secure JWT-based session management, and zero third-party OAuth dependency

confidentiality.notes: Core architecture and live deployment details are proprietary to Keshav Encon Private Limited.

projects.title: ResumeeAI
projects.shortDescription: An AI-powered resume builder with ATS checking, live resume sharing, and a locally fine-tuned Mistral-7B LLM trained on 45,000+ resumes.
projects.longDescription: ResumeeAI is an AI-based resume building portal developed during the final year internship at Keshav Encon. The platform features ATS checking, live resume sharing, and an AI generation engine powered by a locally fine-tuned Mistral-7B LLM trained on 45,000+ resumes. After transitioning to full-time, the AI response time was reduced from 30s to 20s, Gemini API cost was cut by 100% by replacing external dependency with the fine-tuned local model, and the overall backend architecture and platform performance were significantly improved. The project received Best Project recognition from The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda.

problem.summary: Standard resume builders lacked the intelligence to match industrial data standards, had poor ATS alignment, and relied on expensive external AI APIs with high latency.
constraints: Local LLM fine-tuning and deployment constraints on GPU infrastructure
Processing and structuring 45,000+ resume datasets for training
Eliminating external AI API dependency to reduce cost and latency

solution.approach: Fine-tuned a local Mistral-7B LLM on 45,000+ resumes using structured resume template JSON data. Built the full backend from scratch including system architecture, database schema, RESTful APIs, OAuth 2.0 authentication, and AI integration using Node.js, Express.js, MSSQL, and Sequelize ORM.
solution.architecture: Scalable relational backend with 50+ normalized tables, JWT + OAuth 2.0 auth, React.js frontend, and locally hosted fine-tuned LLM replacing external API dependency.
solution.tradeoffs: Fine-tuning locally increased initial development time but eliminated recurring Gemini API costs entirely and reduced AI response latency from 30s to 20s.

features.title: Fine-Tuned Local Mistral-7B LLM
features.description: Fine-tuned a local Mistral-7B model on 45,000+ resumes using structured resume template JSON data, then integrated it into the platform to power all AI features.
features.impact: Reduced AI response time from 30s to 20s; eliminated Gemini API cost by 100% and removed external AI dependency

features.title: ATS Checking & Live Resume Sharing
features.description: Built ATS compatibility checking and live resume sharing functionality into the platform.
features.impact: Improved resume quality and real-world usability for job seekers

features.title: Custom OAuth 2.0 Authentication
features.description: Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication with Google and LinkedIn from scratch without third-party libraries, with JWT-based authorization and backend middleware for API security.
features.impact: Secure, zero-dependency auth with full control over the authentication flow

features.title: Scalable Relational Database
features.description: Designed a complete relational database schema with 50+ normalized tables, indexed relationships, and optimized constraints from scratch.
features.impact: High-performance query execution and long-term data scalability

features.title: Gemini LLM API Integration
features.description: Integrated Gemini AI API during the internship phase to power AI features before transitioning to the locally fine-tuned model.
features.impact: Rapid AI feature delivery during early product development

features.title: Platform Research & Architecture
features.description: Researched 5+ resume builder platforms to understand workflows and product expectations. Designed the full system architecture including database schema and table associations.
features.impact: Well-informed product design aligned with industry standards

challenges.challenge: Replacing the external Gemini API dependency with a locally hosted fine-tuned model without degrading AI quality.
challenges.solution: Fine-tuned Mistral-7B on 45,000+ structured resumes and deployed it on high-end NVIDIA GPU infrastructure, then integrated it as a drop-in replacement for the Gemini API.
challenges.learning: Fine-tuning domain-specific LLMs on structured datasets can outperform general-purpose external APIs while eliminating recurring cost and latency.

challenges.challenge: Structuring 45,000+ unstructured resumes into training-ready JSON data.
challenges.solution: Designed a structured resume template JSON schema and built a pipeline to normalize resume data into that format at scale.
challenges.learning: Data preparation is the most critical and time-intensive step in any LLM fine-tuning project.

metrics.performance: AI response time reduced from 30s to 20s after fine-tuning local Mistral-7B
metrics.scale: Trained on 45,000+ resumes; 50+ normalized tables in relational schema
metrics.reliability: 100% Gemini API cost eliminated; zero external AI dependency post fine-tuning

confidentiality.notes: Project was built during internship. Received Best Project recognition from The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda.

projects.title: UninestAI
projects.shortDescription: A student placement and university management portal connecting students, universities, and companies — built on a transaction-safe Stored Procedure with 100+ SP-driven APIs.
projects.longDescription: UninestAI is a student placement and university management portal connecting students, universities, and companies. The backend is built on a transaction-safe Stored Procedure framework with structured error handling and inter-procedure communication. The system features a normalized MSSQL schema with optimized indexing, 100+ SP-driven REST APIs, Role-Based Access Control, and comprehensive Swagger documentation for cross-team efficiency. Business requirements were translated into well-defined technical workflows and execution plans before any development began.

problem.summary: Only few enterprise level portals existed to manage and connect the full lifecycle of student placement — bridging students, universities, and companies in one system with secure, role-specific access. Current portals are not completely dynamic as per university requirements.
constraints: Need for a completely dynamic portal as per university requirements are different
Unique structure of portal as per university requirements
Different features and role based access as per university requirements are difffernt
Complex multi-entity relationships between students, universities, and companies
Need for transaction-safe data operations with structured error handling
Multi-level RBAC for different user types across the portal

solution.approach: Conducted end-to-end feature research and translated business requirements into technical execution plans. Built a transaction-safe Stored Procedure with dynamic features and role based access as per university requirements, with a modular REST API architecture on top.
solution.architecture: Normalized MSSQL schema with optimized indexing, transaction-safe SP framework with inter-procedure communication, modular REST API architecture, and RBAC for secure role-specific access.
solution.tradeoffs: SP-driven architecture adds initial complexity in procedure design but provides stronger transaction safety, structured error handling, and better performance for complex multi-table operations.

features.title: Transaction-Safe Stored Procedure Framework
features.description: Built a structured Stored Procedure framework with transaction safety, error handling, and inter-procedure communication to manage complex data operations reliably.
features.impact: Improved reliability and consistency of complex multi-table data operations

features.title: 100+ SP-Driven REST APIs
features.description: Designed a scalable, modular REST API architecture and developed 100+ APIs with SP-driven backend logic, with clear request and response contracts.
features.impact: Maintainable and extensible API layer supporting long-term platform growth

features.title: Normalized MSSQL Schema
features.description: Designed and implemented a normalized MSSQL database schema with optimized indexing and efficient relational mapping across all core platform modules.
features.impact: High data integrity, optimized query performance, and clean relational structure

features.title: RBAC for University Users
features.description: Implemented Role-Based Access Control ensuring secure, reliable, and role-specific feature access for students, university administrators, and companies.
features.impact: Secure multi-entity access management across the portal

features.title: Swagger (OpenAPI) Documentation
features.description: Created comprehensive OpenAPI (Swagger) documentation for all APIs to streamline frontend integration and improve cross-team development efficiency.
features.impact: Significantly reduced frontend integration time and improved cross-team collaboration

features.title: Business Requirement Translation
features.description: Conducted feature research and translated business requirements into well-defined technical workflows and execution plans before development.
features.impact: Clear technical direction aligned with business goals from day one

challenges.challenge: Designing a transaction-safe data layer that handles complex operations across multiple entities (students, universities, companies) reliably.
challenges.solution: Built a Stored Procedure framework with structured error handling and inter-procedure communication, ensuring atomic transactions across complex multi-table operations.
challenges.learning: SP-driven architecture, when designed well, provides transaction safety and performance advantages that are difficult to replicate purely through ORM layers.

metrics.performance: 100+ SP-driven APIs with optimized indexing and relational mapping
metrics.scale: Normalized schema supporting multi-entity relationships across students, universities, and companies
metrics.reliability: Transaction-safe SP framework with structured error handling and inter-procedure communication

confidentiality.notes: Core architecture and deployment details are proprietary to Keshav Encon Private Limited.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.shortDescription: A personal portfolio website with a JSON-driven architecture, CI/CD pipeline, and AWS S3 + CloudFront secured document delivery.
projects.longDescription: A personal portfolio website built from scratch to showcase projects, skills, and professional experience. Instead of hardcoding content into HTML/CSS, the entire portfolio is driven by structured JSON files — one per section. Any content update only requires editing the corresponding JSON, and the UI renders it automatically without touching any frontend code. The site is hosted on Vercel with a CI/CD pipeline configured so that every push to the main branch triggers an automatic build and goes live within 10 seconds. Documents and assets are stored in a private AWS S3 bucket wrapped with CloudFront — all public S3 access is blocked, and files are only accessible through the CloudFront distribution.

problem.summary: Needed a professional online presence that was easy to maintain long-term — updating content shouldn't require touching UI code, and documents needed secure delivery without exposing raw S3 URLs.
constraints: Content updates must not require UI code changes
Documents must be securely served without exposing the S3 bucket publicly
Deployments should be instant with zero manual steps

solution.approach: Built a JSON-driven architecture where each portfolio section reads from its own JSON file. The UI dynamically renders whatever is in the JSON, so content and presentation are fully decoupled. Hosted on Vercel with GitHub CI/CD for automatic deployments, and documents served via CloudFront-wrapped private S3.
solution.architecture: React.js SPA with section-level JSON data files, Vercel hosting with GitHub-integrated CI/CD, and AWS S3 + CloudFront for secure private document delivery.
solution.tradeoffs: JSON-driven approach adds a small layer of data-fetching logic on the frontend but eliminates the need to ever touch UI code for content updates — a worthwhile trade for long-term maintainability.

features.title: JSON-Driven Content Architecture
features.description: Each section of the portfolio (projects, experience, skills, etc.) is backed by its own JSON file. The React UI reads and renders it dynamically — no hardcoded content anywhere.
features.impact: Content updates require zero UI code changes; just update the JSON and it reflects live

features.title: CI/CD with Vercel + GitHub
features.description: Configured a CI/CD pipeline where every push to the main branch is automatically picked up by Vercel, which builds and deploys the latest version.
features.impact: New version goes live within 10 seconds of pushing to main — zero manual deployment steps

features.title: Private S3 Bucket with CloudFront
features.description: All documents and assets are stored in a private AWS S3 bucket with all public access blocked. Files are served exclusively through a CloudFront distribution, keeping the bucket secure.
features.impact: Secure document delivery — S3 bucket is never exposed publicly, all access goes through CloudFront

challenges.challenge: Keeping the S3 bucket fully private while still serving documents publicly through the portfolio.
challenges.solution: Configured CloudFront as the only access point to the S3 bucket using an Origin Access Control (OAC) policy, blocking all direct S3 public access.
challenges.learning: CloudFront + private S3 is a clean pattern for serving assets securely without exposing storage infrastructure.

metrics.performance: Deployments go live within 10 seconds of a push to main
metrics.scale: Fully decoupled content layer — any section can be updated by editing a single JSON file
metrics.reliability: Private S3 bucket with CloudFront — zero public S3 exposure, secure asset delivery
